svg.title: Pattern 3 — Singleton, Adapter and Decorator structures
svg.desc: Three GoF structural and creational patterns applied to MAS: Singleton for AuthService, Adapter for LegacyExportServiceAdapter, and Decorator for LoggingReportEngineDecorator.
svg.text: LoggingDecorator writes a timestamped audit entry before and after
each GenerateReport() and ExportReport() call. ReportEngine is
unchanged. Satisfies UC12: "export action is logged for audit."
